WebReferences.TitleEn: Moodie, Rosemary. From Vision to Reality: On a National Strategy for Children and Youth in Canada. Ottawa, Senate of Canada, 2023.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Moodie. Rosemary. D’une vision à la réalité : Sur une stratégie nationale pour les enfants et les jeunes au Canada, Ottawa, Sénat du Canada, 2023.
WebReferences.Title: Moodie, Rosemary. From Vision to Reality: On a National Strategy for Children and Youth in Canada. Ottawa, Senate of Canada, 2023.

WebReferences.Title: Children First Canada. The Canadian Children’s Charter: A Call to Action to Respect, Protect and Fulfil the Rights of Canada’s Children. 20 November 2018.
